tasks.prompt: Benchmark case DOC-SYNC-001 for qa-plan-orchestrator. Use the qa-plan-orchestrator documentation set as the target artifact family. Feature family: docs. Knowledge pack: docs. with_skill.instruction: Execute qa-plan-orchestrator benchmark case DOC-SYNC-001 with the current champion skill snapshot loaded. Save outputs under eval-12/with_skill/run-1/outputs.
